body:
## Summary
- Add focused Playwright coverage for exam route provenance source-note controls in active and submitted-review states.
- Assert Swedish and English source-note text opens and collapses via pointer activation, Enter, and Space.
- Narrow UHR reference checks to heading roles so provenance badges do not satisfy delayed reference-card assertions.

## Validation
- `./node_modules/.bin/prettier --check tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts --workers=1 -g "provenance|source note|mock exam"`

## Known unrelated blocker
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content` currently fails on main with `q001 generated variant[1] options do not match generated answer template`.
title: [codex] test exam provenance source-note toggles
